name: unforget
description: A single source of truth for deferred work (paused plans, mid-task spillover, audit findings, observed-but-not-yet-fixed bugs). Enforces ONE file per project (UNFORGET.md), four sections of 10-column rating tables, with a release-cycle Target column that promotes deferred items toward shipping at each release. Prevents the most common deferral failure mode: items get logged in five different places and then nobody can find them when it matters.

skills.name: unforget
skills.description: Single source of truth for deferred work. Subcommands: /unforget init, add, edit, import, list, scan, promote.
